allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./scripts/extracted-pyqs.json'\); const topics={}; d.forEach\(q=>{ topics[q.topic]=\(topics[q.topic]||0\)+1; }\); console.log\('Total PYQs:', d.length\); console.log\('By topic:', JSON.stringify\(topics, null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./scripts/extracted-pyqs.json'\); const inc=d.filter\(q=>q.topic==='Incorrect Words'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(inc[0], null, 2\)\);")
